response.justification: Candidate brings broad full-stack experience including current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, plus prior high-throughput work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby. However, the resume shows no Python in the skills list or work history despite it being a must-have, and distributed systems depth is limited to one role years ago. Title is Senior rather than Staff in most recent positions, and there's no explicit stakeholder management or on-call leadership signal at the scale required.
strengths: Current hands-on work with AI agents and MCP code generators aligns with the agentic-development mindset
Prior high-throughput microservices experience at Sociomantic handling millions of requests/second
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background plus craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
concerns: Python is absent from the skills list and employment history — a stated must-have
Distributed systems depth is concentrated in one role (2018-2020); recent work is product/pricing-focused
No clear evidence of Staff-level technical strategy ownership or cross-functional stakeholder leadership
